mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_team(org_id, team_name, team_type, team_intro, service_country_scope, service_major_scope, is_front_visible, status) VALUES(#{orgId}, #{teamName}, #{teamType}, #{teamIntro}, #{serviceCountryScope}, #{serviceMajorScope}, 1, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.select: SELECT id, org_id, team_name, team_type, team_intro, service_country_scope, service_major_scope FROM agency_team WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, org_id, team_name, team_type, team_intro, service_country_scope, service_major_scope FROM agency_team WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT t.id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, t.team_intro AS teamIntro, o.org_name AS orgName, o.city AS city, t.service_country_scope AS serviceCountryScope, t.service_major_scope AS serviceMajorScope, COALESCE(SUM(mm.case_count), 0) AS caseCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.success_rate), 2), 0) AS successRate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.avg_rating), 2), 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.response_efficiency_score), 2), 0) AS responseEfficiencyScore, '价格待上线' AS priceTextPlaceholder FROM agency_team t JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = t.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_member_rel tm ON tm.team_id = t.id AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tm.member_id AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_metrics mm ON mm.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN agency_member_role_rel rr ON rr.member_id = m.id AND rr.role_status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.is_front_visible = 1 AND o.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND ( t.team_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.org_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.team_intro LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.service_country_scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.service_major_scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND t.service_country_scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{country}, '%')
AND t.service_major_scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{direction}, '%')
AND o.city = #{city}
AND rr.role_code = #{roleCode}
AND mm.service_tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{serviceTag}, '%')
GROUP BY t.id, t.team_name, t.team_intro, o.org_name, o.city, t.service_country_scope, t.service_major_scope ORDER BY avgRating DESC, successRate DESC, caseCount DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT t.id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, t.team_type AS teamType, t.team_intro AS teamIntro, o.org_name AS orgName, o.city AS city, t.service_country_scope AS serviceCountryScope, t.service_major_scope AS serviceMajorScope, COALESCE(SUM(mm.case_count), 0) AS caseCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.success_rate), 2), 0) AS successRate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.avg_rating), 2), 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.response_efficiency_score), 2), 0) AS responseEfficiencyScore, '价格待上线' AS priceTextPlaceholder, '套餐内容（开发中）' AS packagePlaceholderTitle, '后续将展示该团队服务产品、分档价格、服务边界和交付内容。' AS packagePlaceholderDesc FROM agency_team t JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = t.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_member_rel tm ON tm.team_id = t.id AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tm.member_id AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_metrics mm ON mm.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = m.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'AGENT_REAL_NAME' LEFT JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = m.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'AGENT_EDUCATION' WHERE t.id = #{teamId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.is_front_visible = 1 AND o.status = 'ACTIVE' AND o.verification_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PENDING') AND ( (vrn.status = 'APPROVED' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED') OR m.verified_badge_status = 'APPROVED' OR m.id IS NULL ) GROUP BY t.id, t.team_name, t.team_type, t.team_intro, o.org_name, o.city, t.service_country_scope, t.service_major_scope LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.id AS memberId, m.display_name AS displayName, m.job_title AS jobTitle, COALESCE(pr.role_code, '') AS roleCode, m.bio AS bio, m.special_countries AS specialCountries, m.special_directions AS specialDirections, m.years_of_experience AS yearsOfExperience, m.education_level AS educationLevel FROM agency_team_member_rel tm JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tm.member_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN agency_member_role_rel pr ON pr.member_id = m.id AND pr.is_primary = 1 AND pr.role_status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = m.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'AGENT_REAL_NAME' LEFT JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = m.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'AGENT_EDUCATION' WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( (vrn.status = 'APPROVED' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED') OR m.verified_badge_status = 'APPROVED' ) ORDER BY CASE roleCode WHEN 'CONSULTANT' THEN 1 WHEN 'PLANNER' THEN 2 WHEN 'WRITER' THEN 3 WHEN 'APPLY_SPECIALIST' THEN 4 WHEN 'VISA_SPECIALIST' THEN 5 WHEN 'AFTERCARE' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END, memberId ASC
